_readme: Optional student profiles for the archive dossier — the LIVE roster. Key each entry by the student SLUG: name lower-cased, accents stripped, spaces -> hyphens ('Zoya' -> 'zoya', 'Zoë O'Brien' -> 'zo-o-brien'). Every field is optional; anything left blank falls back to a graceful placeholder, so you can add students incrementally. Fields: mark (the student's personal artifact — a single chosen glyph like '◇' OR a small image they supply at 'uploads/marks/<slug>.svg'; with none, a filled dot in their colour is shown — never a stand-in symbol), role (short line under the name), bio (a sentence or two), photo (a repo path like 'uploads/portraits/<slug>.jpg' or any https image URL — omit for an auto-generated constellation), links: { instagram, linkedin, behance, website, email } (email may be a bare address). Nothing here is invented from the CSVs; profiles are purely additive. Add one block per student, e.g.:

jane-doe.bio: One or two sentences in the student's own voice.
